unified_frame_statement: Sarah shares her transformation journey with Dr. Maria, showing how holistic gut healing helped her overcome chronic fatigue and brain fog to achieve sustained energy and mental clarity.

state_alpha.internal_monologue: "I thought exhaustion was just part of being a mom."
state_alpha.sensory_anchor: The weight of her eyelids every afternoon at 2pm

the_abyss.realization: "If the tests say I'm fine, why do I feel like I'm dying?"

the_spark.insight_quote: "She explained it wasn't my thyroid, it was my gut not absorbing nutrients." (08:23)

state_omega.action: Daily probiotic protocol and gut-friendly meals

sensory_anchors: The heaviness in her limbs every morning before
The moment she felt clarity wash over during week 3
The lightness in her step walking to meetings now

spr_text: She dragged through days like a zombie, coffee crashing by noon, exhaustion her only companion. The moment the doctor said 'nothing wrong,' she broke—body screaming what tests couldn't measure. Dr. Maria saw what medicine missed: the gut not absorbing nutrients properly. Now she listens to her body first. Energy climbed from 3 to 8 within six weeks. She helps other mothers trust their bodies before trusting only tests.
